name: label-studio-mcp-server
description: The Label Studio MCP enables seamless management and orchestration of data labeling workflows within Label Studio, the leading open-source data annotation platform. With this MCP, users can programmatically create and configure labeling projects, manage tasks at scale, and automate prediction workflows—empowering teams to efficiently curate high-quality training data for machine learning and AI initiatives.
